headline: Tesla CEO Elon Musk Wants To Bring Back Dogecoin As A Payment Option To Buy Company's Merchandise
summary: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ:TSLA) CEO Elon Musk said on Friday that he would like to have the option of paying with meme cryptocurrency Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) reinstated for the company’s merchandise.

headline: Woody Harrelson Reveals He Passed On Tesla Investment Opportunity: 'Big Money Mistake'
summary: Woody Harrelson counts not investing in Elon Musk's EV company Tesla Inc as one of his big investment mistakes to date, the actor said in a recent interview.

headline: Tesla Considers Warner Bros Studio For Highly Anticipated Robotaxi Unveiling Event: Report
